description: Remove Anime Filter from Profile Pictures — replace unreliable anime-fy pipeline with simple resize/WebP conversion for fast, reliable uploads

userStories.title: Replace anime filter with simple image optimization on API
userStories.description: As a user, I want my uploaded profile picture to be stored as a resized, optimized image so that uploads are fast and reliable.
acceptanceCriteria: Remove the animeFilter() call from POST /users/me/profile-picture in services/api/src/routes/users.ts
Replace it with a simple sharp pipeline: auto-rotate, resize to 256×256 (cover/crop), output as WebP — sharp(buffer).rotate().resize(256, 256, { fit: 'cover' }).webp().toBuffer()
Remove the Promise.race timeout wrapper and ANIME_FILTER_TIMEOUT_MS env var logic from users.ts
Remove the import { animeFilter } from '../lib/anime-filter' from users.ts
Update the route's JSDoc comment to remove anime references
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Delete anime filter library and tests
userStories.description: As a developer, I want dead code removed so the codebase stays clean.
acceptanceCriteria: Delete services/api/src/lib/anime-filter.ts
Delete services/api/src/lib/anime-filter.test.ts
No remaining imports or references to anime-filter module in services/api/src/
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Update profile picture upload tests
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the upload tests to reflect the new simpler processing so they remain accurate.
acceptanceCriteria: Update services/api/src/routes/users-profile-picture.test.ts to remove anime filter mocking/assertions
Remove any references to anime-filter, animeFilter, or ANIME_FILTER_TIMEOUT_MS in test code
Remove the anime filter timeout test case
Tests still verify: file validation, size limits, storage upload, signed URL generation, Firestore update
All API tests pass (cd services/api && yarn test)
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Update web UI upload copy
userStories.description: As a user, I want the upload status text to say something accurate (not 'Anime-fying') so the UI makes sense.
acceptanceCriteria: Change '✨ Anime-fying your photo…' to 'Uploading photo…' in apps/web/src/app/(main)/account/page.tsx
Remove the bouncing ✨ spinner and replace with a simple loading indicator or keep the existing Avatar spinner
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Update mobile UI upload copy
userStories.description: As a user on mobile, I want the upload status text to be accurate.
acceptanceCriteria: Change '✨ Anime-fying...' to 'Uploading…' in apps/mobile/src/screens/AccountScreen.tsx
Remove any extended anime-related status messages (e.g. 'Still working…' messaging tied to anime processing time)
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Clean up infrastructure references
userStories.description: As a developer, I want environment config cleaned up so there are no references to the removed feature.
acceptanceCriteria: Remove ANIME_FILTER_TIMEOUT_MS from any Bicep templates, docker-compose files, or documentation that reference it
Verify the sharp dependency is retained in services/api/package.json (still needed for resize/WebP)
Typecheck passes
